parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
const safeTitle = item.title.replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ').slice(0, 120);
const markdown = [
  '---',
  'tipo: captura-orquestrada',
  `origem: ${item.source}`,
  `canal: ${item.channel}`,
  `dominio: ${item.domain}`,
  `intencao: ${item.intent}`,
  `agente_sugerido: ${item.suggested_agent}`,
  `permissao: ${item.permission}`,
  `status: ${item.status}`,
  `capturado_em: ${item.received_at}`,
  '---',
  '',
  `# ${safeTitle}`,
  '',
  item.content,
  '',
  '## Roteamento sugerido',
  '',
  `- Destino: ${item.route}`,
  `- Acao: ${item.next_action}`,
  `- Requer aprovacao: ${item.requires_approval ? 'sim' : 'nao'}`,
  `- Flags: ${item.flags.join(', ') || 'nenhuma'}`,
  ''
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...item, draft_markdown: markdown, status: 'draft_ready' } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.permission === 'blocked' ? 'blocked' : 'ok', request_id: $json.request_id, domain: $json.domain, intent: $json.intent, suggested_agent: $json.suggested_agent, permission: $json.permission, requires_approval: $json.requires_approval, route: $json.route, next_action: $json.next_action, flags: $json.flags, blocked_reason: $json.blocked_reason, audit: $json.audit, draft_markdown: $json.draft_markdown }) }}
